memory.summary: I had planned to finish analysis and reading, but a friend invited me to lunch, creating a conflict between my schedule and social connection.
I made good progress on the assignment analysis, but my friend's message indicates a group order is starting immediately.
I made some progress on the analysis section, but I am still not finished with under an hour left before the deadline.
The assignment deadline has passed while I am only 78% complete, leaving me with no time to finish the analysis section.
Despite working an hour, I only reached 82% completion after the deadline passed, confirming the assignment is effectively unfinished.
The reading deadline passed with zero progress, compounding the stress of an already unfinished analysis assignment despite recent work.
I have made slight progress on the analysis section, but since the deadline has already passed, this work is likely too late to save the assignment.
The assignment deadline has passed, so the minimal progress made on the analysis section is unlikely to salvage the work.
Despite working briefly on the analysis section, my low energy and accumulated sleep debt make it clear that salvaging this overdue assignment is unlikely.
I continued working on the analysis section, reaching 96% completion, but with zero energy and a passed deadline, this effort remains futile.
Even with 97% progress, the passed deadline and zero energy make this effort futile; I need to stop.
Despite reaching 99% completion, my zero energy and two-hour sleep debt confirm that finishing this overdue assignment is impossible right now.
